nasb.text: In whose eyes a reprobate is despised, But who honors those who fear the Lord; He swears to his own hurt and does not change;

esv.text: in whose eyes a vile person is despised, but who honors those who fear the Lord; who swears to his own hurt and does not change;

cnv.text: 他眼中藐視卑鄙的人， 卻尊重敬畏耶和華的人。 他起了誓，縱然自己吃虧，也不更改。

ccb.text: 他鄙视恶人， 尊重那些敬畏耶和华的人。 他起了誓，即使吃亏也不背誓。

csbs.text: 他眼中轻视被神所厌弃的人， 却尊重敬畏耶和华的人； 他起了誓，就算自己吃亏也不反悔。
